text: 22. Subcontractor  to  provide  and  competent  full-time  foreman/lead  installer  on-site  that  is  fluent  in  English  while performing Work on the Project Site.  The foreman will have extensive knowledge of the Work and a complete set of  current  Subcontract  Documents and  approved  shop  drawings  associated  with  Subcontractor's  Work.  The foreman will have means to communicate with Subcontractor management authorized to make binding decisions. The lead installer shall attend all Project meetings on behalf of Subcontractor.
